prompts.createFirst: Click 'New Prompt' above to create your first AI Text Optimization prompt.

prompts.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe what this Skill does and when it should be triggered
prompts.generationDescription: Generates new content based on the recognized text as a prompt (e.g., translation, summarization).
prompts.jsonHint: Note: If your prompt instructs the AI to output JSON with text and confidence fields, the review window will trigger automatically.
prompts.promptInstructionsPlaceholder: Write the instructions to run after transcription. Example: Based on ${context}, fix technical terms in the following text: ${output}
prompts.promptTip:
Tip: The system automatically sends input data as a separate message to the AI. You only need to reference variable names in your prompt:
Input Variables (auto-appended):
${output}: Final transcribed text.
${raw_input}: Complete original transcription.
${select}: Text selected when recording ended.
${streaming_output}: Real-time transcription (works with output for better accuracy).
${hot_words}: Your custom vocabulary/hot words.
${context}: Historical context from the active window.
Metadata Variables (directly replaced):
${prompt}: Current prompt scheme name.

Fallback: If your prompt doesn't reference output/raw_input/select, the system will automatically append the transcription at the end, so you can write pure task descriptions.

Note: If your prompt instructs the AI to output JSON with text and confidence fields, the review window will trigger automatically.
prompts.refinementDescription: Automatically corrects and formats the recognized text.

selectedPrompt.description: The system automatically sends referenced variables (like ${output}, ${select}) as a separate message to the AI. If no input variables are referenced, the system will auto-append the transcription.
selectedPrompt.title: Selected Prompt

prompts.selectToEdit: Select a prompt above to view and edit its details.
prompts.title: Prompt
prompts.varContextDesc: Historical context from the active window.
prompts.varHotWordsDesc: Custom vocabulary/hot words from Advanced Settings.
